subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden! O leaf! O thou who rememberest God! Praise be to the peerless Pearl of the ocean of inner meanings, Who is mentioned in the divine Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه ای ورقه ای ذاکره الحمد لله بیکتا لولو بحر معانی که در کتب الهی مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
